name: adv-research
title: ADV Research Command (RETIRED)
purpose: RETIRED: /adv-research has been replaced by /adv-discover (discovery gate) and /adv-design (design gate) in the 7-gate collaborative workflow. This spec is preserved for historical reference and legacy migration. New changes should use /adv-discover for context gathering and /adv-design for architecture validation.

requirements.title: Research Produces Validated Decisions Only (RETIRED)
requirements.body: RETIRED: This requirement is superseded by /adv-discover (context gathering, agreement.md) and /adv-design (architecture validation, design.md). Legacy changes with a research gate are auto-migrated to the discovery+design gates.

scenarios.title: Research updates proposal.md with findings but creates zero tasks (RETIRED)
given: A user invokes /adv-research on an active change

scenarios.title: Research on deployed spec creates change but defers tasks to prep (RETIRED)
given: A user invokes /adv-research on a deployed spec
then: Legacy behavior is no longer active

requirements.title: Research Validates Architecture and Best Practices (RETIRED)
requirements.body: RETIRED: Architecture validation is now handled by /adv-design (design gate). Context gathering is handled by /adv-discover (discovery gate).

scenarios.title: Architecture health assessment included in report (RETIRED)
given: A user invokes /adv-research on a change
then: The command redirects to /adv-design for architecture validation

scenarios.title: Research completes the research gate (RETIRED)
given: A user invokes /adv-research on an active change
then: The research gate no longer exists in the 7-gate model
Legacy changes with a research gate are auto-migrated to discovery+design

requirements.title: Research Prohibited Actions (RETIRED)
requirements.body: RETIRED: These constraints are now distributed across /adv-discover and /adv-design. Task synthesis remains the exclusive responsibility of /adv-prep.

scenarios.title: Research only completes the research gate (RETIRED)
then: The research gate no longer exists; replaced by discovery and design gates

requirements.title: Research Output Contract for Prep Consumption (RETIRED)
requirements.body: RETIRED: The research output contract is superseded by agreement.md (from /adv-discover + /adv-agree) and design.md (from /adv-design + /adv-present), which /adv-prep consumes for task synthesis.

scenarios.title: Research output contains structured sections for prep (RETIRED)
then: agreement.md and design.md replace the Research Validation section in proposal.md
